appraisal_events.evidence: Les mots « deux ou trois fois » marquèrent à vif une sorte de croix dans son coeur... sa jalousie... le poussait à sa perte.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator shows Swann overwhelmed by Odette’s partial confession and by his own jealousy, which tortures him and draws him toward suffering.

status_effects.explanation: Swann undergoes a clear emotional fall, pierced by Odette’s confessions and dominated by a destructive jealousy.
